note: Conformance vectors for crewAI #5888 / PR #6030. Inputs are pre-tokenized argv (tokenization is the runtime's job, upstream of this normalization). Each form normalizes by stripping transparent wrappers/spawners + NAME=value prefixes down to the real executable+argv (see agent-guard-unwrap-v1.md). gate_read_only records the real agent-guard verdict class used by the Rust fidelity harness.

divergence_pairs.note: same wrapper, different real executable -> different normalized body -> different digest -> different gate verdict
same executable, different argv -> different normalized body -> different digest

fail_closed_target_hiding.reason: xargs supplies the operands (paths) from stdin -> write target unverifiable at authorization time -> fail closed
find -exec supplies the operands from the filesystem traversal ({}) -> write target unverifiable -> fail closed
